paper_title: BlenderBot 3: a deployed conversational agent that continually learns to responsibly engage

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces modular dialogue generation with specialized modules for internet search, knowledge grounding, and long-term memory, built upon an encoder-decoder architecture.
raw_extraction.application: Open-domain conversational agent, internet-augmented dialogue, long-term memory retrieval, continual learning from user interactions
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (with partial open-source components like R2C2)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Deployed open-domain conversational agents capable of continual learning from real-world interactions.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Modular dialogue fine-tuning (QA, open-domain, knowledge-grounded, task-oriented)
raw_extraction.extension: Uses Fusion-in-Decoder method for handling long-term memory within limited context window (2048 tokens).
raw_extraction.paper_title: BlenderBot 3: a deployed conversational agent that continually learns to responsibly engage

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up decoder-only architecture with modular dialogue capabilities, leveraging OPT's pre-training for improved performance on complex conversational tasks.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: OPT pre-training corpus (~180B tokens, combining RoBERTa cc100en, Reddit, ThePile, GPT2 dictionary)
raw_extraction.application: Open-domain conversational agent, internet-augmented dialogue, long-term memory retrieval, continual learning from user interactions
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (with partial open-source components like OPT)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Deployed open-domain conversational agents capable of continual learning from real-world interactions with advanced contextual reasoning.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Modular dialogue fine-tuning (QA, open-domain, knowledge-grounded, task-oriented)
raw_extraction.extension: Includes internet search integration and long-term memory retrieval modules for dynamic knowledge grounding during dialogue.
raw_extraction.paper_title: BlenderBot 3: a deployed conversational agent that continually learns to responsibly engage

raw_extraction.innovation: Largest-scale BlenderBot variant with enhanced modular dialogue capabilities, designed for sophisticated internet-augmented conversations and long-term memory retention.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: OPT pre-training corpus (~180B tokens, combining RoBERTa cc100en, Reddit, ThePile, GPT2 dictionary)
raw_extraction.application: Open-domain conversational agent, internet-augmented dialogue, long-term memory retrieval, continual learning from user interactions, responsible engagement with organic users
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (with partial open-source components like OPT)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Deployed open-domain conversational agents capable of highly nuanced, internet-aware, and continually improving dialogues through real-time user interactions.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Modular dialogue fine-tuning (QA, open-domain, knowledge-grounded, task-oriented)
raw_extraction.extension: Enhanced internet search and knowledge extraction modules for richer contextual responses, combined with long-term memory retrieval for persistent conversational coherence.
raw_extraction.paper_title: BlenderBot 3: a deployed conversational agent that continually learns to responsibly engage

raw_extraction.innovation: BlenderBot 3 leverages **OPT-175B** as its base model for zero-shot and few-shot dialogue capabilities, emphasizing **modular safety mechanisms** and **continual learning** to adapt to real-world usage patterns.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: The Pile dataset (800GB of diverse text) and additional proprietary datasets
raw_extraction.application: Open-domain conversational agent, zero-shot/few-shot dialogue generation, safety-critical chatbot deployment
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, safe, and aligned open-domain dialogue generation with minimal supervision
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuned for zero-shot and few-shot dialogue generation using conversational data
raw_extraction.paper_title: BlenderBot 3: a deployed conversational agent that continually learns to responsibly engage

raw_extraction.innovation: BlenderBot 3’s few-shot adaptation focuses on **dynamic alignment with user intent**, incorporating **reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF)** and **modular safety checks** to refine responses in real-time.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: The Pile dataset (800GB of diverse text) and additional proprietary datasets
raw_extraction.application: Open-domain conversational agent, few-shot dialogue generation, safety-critical chatbot deployment
raw_extraction.research_problem: Adaptive, human-aligned dialogue generation with minimal manual annotation
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Few-shot dialogue fine-tuning with human feedback and safety constraints
raw_extraction.paper_title: BlenderBot 3: a deployed conversational agent that continually learns to responsibly engage
